title: Gandaki Province - The Kathmandu Post
summary: Home Minister Gurung claims deception in Phewa Lake land lease. content:
Home Minister Gurung claims deception in Phewa Lake land lease. Landowner disputes claim By Deepak Pariyar Authorities say structures linked to Gurung fall within a protected zone, while he claims he was misled about the land’s location and plans to seek legal remedy. Police, machines deployed to reclaim Phewa Lake territory By Deepak Pariyar On Saturday morning those living by the lake woke up to the clatter of excavators deployed to remove structures built on lake land. Landslide-hit Besisahar–Chame road reopens By Post Report Traffic resumes as authorities repair damaged section in Lamjung’s Marsyangdi Rural Municipality. Swarnim Wagle wins Tanahun-1 By Post Report Defeats Govinda Bhattarai by 21,809 votes. Mahabir Pun wins Myagdi seat By Post Report The former minister triumphs with 22,850 votes. Unsigned ballots delay vote count in Syangja-2 By Pratichya Kafle Dispute over 171 ballots without polling officer’s signature stalls counting process. Rastriya Swatantra Party widens lead in all three Kaski constituencies By Deepak Pariyar Khadkaraj Paudel, Uttam Prasad Paudel, and Bina Gurung pull ahead as early vote count continues. Rastriya Swatantra Party’s Uttam Prasad Paudel leads in Kaski-2 By Post Report Paudel ahead by nearly 400 votes over UML’s Rashmi Acharya in early count. Three polling centres in Manang see zero turnout so far By Post Report Chief District Officer Navaraj Poudyal said wards 1 and 3 of Narpabumi Rural Municipality have yet to see any voters. Monkey menace in Parbat disrupts farming and daily life By Suman Jung Thapa Voters call for national control policy as attacks increase. Heavy snowfall hits Upper Manang By Aash Gurung Snowfall disrupts daily life and tourism. UML, RPP candidates withdraw nominations in Manang By Aash Gurung Three candidates remain in the fray for the House of Representatives elections. Injured leopard rescued from Gorkha community forest By Hariram Uprety Division Forest Office says one cub was found dead and another was taken for treatment. 31 police offices damaged in Gandaki Province during Gen Z protests By Anup Paudel Major losses reported in Kaski; over Rs21 million worth of personal property destroyed. Nicholous Bhusal arrested from Gorkha By Hariram Upreti Police say Bhusal was on their watchlist and will be brought to Kathmandu for further investigation. Potholes on Pokhara–Baglung highway raise safety concerns By Post Report Commuters and transport operators call for urgent repairs as road conditions deteriorate. Annapurna Circuit trail reopens for trekkers after snow cleared By Aash Gurung Trekking routes in upper Manang and Tilicho have been cleared as the weather improves, bringing back tourists. 1,500 rescued after heavy snowfall in Manang By Post Report They were safely evacuated by a Nepali Army rescue team amid extreme weather in upper Manang. One killed, 13 injured as microbus crashes in Tanahun By Samjhana Rasaili The microbus lost control and rammed into a wall and a parked vehicle along the Prithvi Highway. Female rhino found dead in Nawalparasi East By Narayan Sharma With this, five rhinos have died in Chitwan National Park since mid-July.

By Deepak Pariyar
